name: scrumway-web
description: ScrumWay static web app served from docs/

scripts.test: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); const files = ['docs/index.html','docs/app.js','docs/style.css']; const missing = files.filter(p => !fs.existsSync(p)); if (missing.length) { console.error('Arquivos faltando: ' + missing.join(', ')); process.exit(1); } console.log('Estrutura válida: todos os arquivos principais existem.');"
